project.name: Cat Agent States 展示页
project.designRead: Component showcase / developer audience / playful warm / balanced density / avoid dark tech AI aesthetic

creativeRecipe.visualSignature: warm cream surface with coral accent, pixel cat as interactive hero centerpiece

styleContinuityAnchors.colorSystem: warm cream (#FFFAF5) base, coral (#E88C64) primary, soft brown text (#2D2017)
styleContinuityAnchors.shapeSystem: rounded corners (8/12/20px), soft card surfaces with border, no harsh edges
styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: system sans-serif stack, clean and readable
styleContinuityAnchors.spacingSystem: generous padding, breathing room between cards
styleContinuityAnchors.componentLanguage: bordered cards with hover lift, inline code tags, subtle dividers
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: white cards on cream background, no shadows on static elements
styleContinuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: pixel art GIFs with image-rendering: pixelated, Lucide icons for UI
styleContinuityAnchors.interactionTone: gentle hover transitions, playful click interactions

pages.title: 展示页
pages.visualNorthStar: An inviting, warm showcase that makes developers want to use this pixel cat in their own projects
